post.description: Retrieve a list of channels that match the specified filter criteria

post.summary: Retrieve a list of content changes
post.description: Retrieve a paginated list of product content changes for a given store. Returns one record per product with per-field change status, original value, benchmark value and last-changed timestamp. Page size is capped at 500 items per request. Uses zero-based page indexing (pageIndex starts at 0).

post.summary: Retrieve a list of orders for an Amazon channel (Requires Enterprise plan)
post.description:
Retrieve a list of orders for an Amazon channel that match the specified filter criteria. 

**NOTE: This endpoint is only available to users on the Enterprise plan.**

post.summary: Create a sales by product report
post.description: Create a "sales by product" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `SalesByProductReportColumns` schema. For Amazon Vendor channels, 'totalSales' is replaced by 'poValue' and 'unitsSold' by 'unitsOrdered'. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a traffic and conversion report
post.description: Create a "traffic and conversion" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `TrafficAndConversionReportColumns` schema. When the 'view' option is set to 'skus', additional columns 'sku' and 'brand' are included. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a cancellations and refunds report
post.description: Create a "cancellations and refunds" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `CancellationsAndRefundsReportColumns` schema. Note that cancelledSales, cancelRate, and their prior period equivalents are hidden for Amazon seller channels. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a customer lifetime value report
post.description: Create a "customer lifetime value" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `CustomerLifetimeValueReportColumns` schema including cohort metrics such as LTV, CAC, and repeat purchase frequency. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create a "shipped revenue" report (Amazon Vendor). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `ShippedRevenueReportColumns` schema. The 'view' option selects between 'sourcing' and 'manufacturing' data. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create an "ordered revenue" report (Amazon Vendor). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `OrderedRevenueReportColumns` schema. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create an "inventory health" report (Amazon Vendor). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `InventoryHealthReportColumns` schema including sellable, unhealthy, aged, and unsellable inventory metrics. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create a "campaigns" report (Amazon Advertising). The download contains multiple CSV files: campaigns, ad groups, keywords, product ads, and products. See the `CampaignsReportCampaignColumns`, `CampaignsReportAdGroupColumns`, `CampaignsReportKeywordColumns`, `CampaignsReportProductAdColumns`, and `CampaignsReportProductColumns` schemas for the columns in each file. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create an "inventory replenishment" report (Amazon FBA). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `InventoryReplenishmentReportColumns` schema including days cover, projected OOS dates, and replenishment recommendations. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a channel profit and loss report
post.description: Create a "channel profit and loss" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `ChannelProfitAndLossReportColumns` schema including revenue, fees, COGS, advertising, and profit breakdown by store. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create an Amazon Buy Box Performance Report report
post.description: Create an Amazon Buy Box Performance report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `AmazonBuyBoxPerformanceReportColumns` schema including your price, competitive price, and detailed offer attributes. An additional 'offerPoints' column is included for Japanese marketplaces. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create a "repeat purchase" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `RepeatPurchaseReportColumns` schema including repeat customer counts, sales percentages, and per-customer revenue metrics. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

Create a "suppressed product" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `SuppressedProductReportColumns` schema including suppression dates, issue types, estimated lost sales, and fix URLs. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a marketing by product report
post.description: Create a "marketing by product" report. The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `MarketingByProductReportColumns` schema including ad sales, spend, ACOS, ROAS, TACOS, and new-to-brand metrics by store. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a subscribe and save report
post.description: Create a "subscribe and save" report (Amazon). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `SubscribeAndSaveReportColumns` schema including subscriber counts, shipped revenue, revenue penetration, and discount tiers. Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

post.summary: Create a products report (Requires Enterprise plan)
post.description:
Create a "products" report (Amazon). The generated report CSV contains the columns defined in the `ProductsReportColumns` schema including pricing, inventory, COGS, fees, and category information. 

**NOTE: This endpoint is only available to users on the Enterprise plan.** Use the /reports/status/{reportId} endpoint to check report status and obtain the download URL.

get.summary: Retrieve custom groups for a channel
get.description: Retrieve the list of custom product groups defined for a given channel.

post.description: Create a new custom product group for a channel.

get.description: Retrieve a single custom group with its associated products and brands.

patch.description: Add or remove products/brands and optionally rename the group. Provide at least one of addProducts, removeProducts, addBrands, removeBrands, or groupName. Cannot mix product and brand operations in the same request.

delete.description: Delete a custom product group for a channel.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of tags across all of the caller's channels. Each item is one channel with its tags. Organisation-wide tags are prefixed with 'org://'. Pagination uses pageIndex/pageSize (zero-based); pageSize defaults to 25 and is capped at 100, pageIndex defaults to 0.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of channels per page (default 25, max 100)

get.summary: Retrieve tags from a specific channel
get.description: Retrieve the tags for a single channel, identified by channelId and merchantId. Organisation-wide tags are prefixed with 'org://'. A channel with no tags returns an empty tags array.

parameters.name: merchantId
parameters.description: Merchant ID of the channel (URL-encode values containing spaces or '@')

patch.summary: Add and/or remove tags on a specific channel
patch.description: Partially update the tags on a single channel, identified by channelId and merchantId, by supplying addTags and/or removeTags. At least one of the two must be provided, and a tag cannot appear in both lists. A maximum of 5 tags can be added in a single call. Organisation-wide tags are prefixed with 'org://'. Returns the channel's full tag set after the change.

requestBody.description: Channel identifiers and the tags to add and/or remove (at least one of addTags / removeTags)

post.summary: Convert a tag between private and shared
post.description: Toggle a single tag (private/shared) across every channel that carries it. Shared tags are prefixed with 'org://'; converting a private tag makes it 'org://<tag>' and vice versa. Only one tag can be converted per request. Returns the full tag set after the conversion.

tag.description: The tag to convert between private and shared scope. Shared tags are prefixed with 'org://'. Must be a non-empty string.

ConvertTagsResponse.description: The caller's full tag set across all channels after the conversion.

tags.description: Tags for the channel. Shared tags are prefixed with 'org://'.

searchText.description: Search by product identifier, title or product type

differentKeys.description: Comma-separated list of fields to filter by 'different' status (e.g. 'title,images'). Valid values: title, images, bulletPoints, description, browseNode, productType, relationships

pageSize.description: Number of results per page (default 100, max 500)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of last content change check

fields.description: Per-field change information. Only fields that have been tracked are present.

status.description: Whether the current value differs from the benchmark

original.description: Current value on the marketplace (string, array of strings, or relationships object)

lastDifferentAt.description: Timestamp when this field was last observed as different

tags.description: Tags for the channel. Organisation-wide tags are prefixed with 'org://'.

addTags.description: Tags to add to the channel. Non-empty strings only. Organisation-wide tags are prefixed with 'org://'.

removeTags.description: Tags to remove from the channel. Non-empty strings only. Tags not present on the channel are ignored.

SalesByPeriodRequest.description: Payload used to request the sales-by-period view report.

merchantId.description: MerchantSpring merchant identifier for the account whose performance should be returned.

channelId.description: MerchantSpring channel identifier for the account whose performance should be returned.

reportOptions.description: Defines the reporting window and comparison period that should be analysed.

includeTax.description: True by default. When true, gross sales figures include tax; when false, results are reported net of tax.

sellerSkus.description: Optional list of seller SKUs to restrict the dataset to specific products.

VendorSalesByPeriodRequest.description: Payload used to request the vendor sales-by-period view report.

merchantId.description: MerchantSpring merchant identifier for the account whose performance should be returned.

channelId.description: MerchantSpring channel identifier for the account whose performance should be returned.

reportOptions.description: Defines the reporting window and comparison period that should be analysed.

asins.description: Optional list of ASINs to restrict the dataset to specific products.

allOf.description: Defines the principal and comparison date windows for the report and how results should be bucketed.

interval.description: Interval code that controls how results are bucketed (y=year, Q=quarter, M=month, w=week, d=day, h=hour).

allOf.description: Defines the principal and comparison date windows for the report and how results should be bucketed.

interval.description: Interval code that controls how results are bucketed (y=year, Q=quarter, M=month, w=week, d=day, h=hour).

SalesByPeriodPerformanceSnapshot.description: Raw metrics returned by the marketplace service for a single time bucket.

startTime.description: Unix epoch seconds at which this time bucket begins.

endTime.description: Unix epoch seconds at which this time bucket ends.

sales.description: Gross merchandise value for the period in the marketplace's native currency.

lineItemCount.description: Number of order line items captured during the period.

unitsSold.description: Total units sold during the period.

avgLineItemValue.description: Average value per order line item in the marketplace's native currency.

pageViews.description: Number of product detail page views recorded.

unitsPerView.description: Units sold divided by page views for the period.

totalSessions.description: Number of unique shopping sessions captured.

unitsPerSession.description: Units sold divided by total sessions for the period.

buyboxWinPercentage.description: Percentage of page views where the merchant won the Buy Box.

adSpend.description: Advertising spend recorded during the period in the marketplace's native currency.

adSales.description: Attributed ad-driven sales for the period in the marketplace's native currency.

impressions.description: Number of ad impressions served during the period.

clickThroughRate.description: Ratio of ad clicks to impressions expressed as a percentage.

acos.description: Advertising cost of sales (ad spend divided by ad sales) expressed as a percentage.

tacos.description: Total advertising cost of sales (ad spend divided by total sales) expressed as a percentage.

FormattedSalesByPeriodChartData.description: Human-readable metrics pre-formatted using the requested currency and timezone.

startTime.description: Formatted start timestamp for the time bucket (respecting the requested interval and timezone).

SalesByProductReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Sales By Product report CSV. For Amazon Vendor channels, 'totalSales' is replaced by 'poValue' and 'unitsSold' is replaced by 'unitsOrdered'.

id.description: Product identifier from the source system

totalSales.description: Total sales revenue in the period (non-vendor channels)

unitsSold.description: Total units sold in the period (non-vendor channels)

poValue.description: Purchase order value (Amazon Vendor channels only)

daysCover.description: Estimated days of inventory cover remaining

salesRank.description: Product sales rank in its category

brand.description: Brand name (included only in child/SKU view)

mobileSessionsPercentage.description: Percentage of sessions from mobile devices

priorBuyboxWinPercentage.description: Prior period Buy Box win percentage

OrderedRevenueReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Ordered Revenue report CSV (Amazon Vendor). Columns 'vpi' and 'brand' may be included depending on the data granularity.

glanceViews.description: Number of product detail page views (current period)

priorGlanceViews.description: Number of product detail page views (prior period)

conversionRate.description: Conversion rate: Units per view (current period)

priorConversionRate.description: Conversion rate: Units per view (prior period)

ShippedRevenueReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Shipped Revenue report CSV (Amazon Vendor). The 'view' option selects between 'sourcing' and 'manufacturing' data branches.

shippedCogs.description: Shipped Cost of Goods Sold (current period)

priorUnitCogs.description: Prior period cost of goods per unit

InventoryHealthReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Inventory Health report CSV (Amazon Vendor).

aged90DaysCost.description: Cost of inventory aged over 90 days

aged90DaysUnits.description: Units of inventory aged over 90 days

averageVendorLeadTimeDays.description: Average vendor lead time in days

netFilledRate.description: Net filled rate (received units / total ordered units)

sourceableProductOutOfStockRate.description: Out of stock rate for sourceable products (percentage)

procurableProductOutOfStockRate.description: Out of stock rate for procurable products (percentage)

InventoryReplenishmentReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Inventory Replenishment report CSV (Amazon FBA).

estimatedReorderDate.description: Estimated date by which to reorder

totalInventory.description: Total inventory units across all locations

awdOnhandQuantity.description: Amazon Warehousing and Distribution on-hand quantity

awdInboundQuantity.description: Amazon Warehousing and Distribution inbound quantity

estimatedStorageCostNextMonth.description: Estimated storage cost for the next month

dailySales7.description: Average daily sales over the last 7 days

dailySales30.description: Average daily sales over the last 30 days

dailySales60.description: Average daily sales over the last 60 days

dailySales90.description: Average daily sales over the last 90 days

CampaignsReportColumns.description: The campaigns report generates multiple CSV files: campaigns, ad groups, keywords, product ads, and products. See the sub-schemas below for the columns in each file.

CampaignsReportCampaignColumns.description: Columns in the campaigns CSV file of the Campaigns report download.

ad_type.description: Type of ad (e.g. SP, SB, SD)

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

attributed_orders_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand orders as a percentage of total

attributed_units_ordered_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand units as a percentage of total

attributed_sales_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand sales as a percentage of total

attributed_detail_page_views_clicks.description: Detail page view clicks attributed to ads

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)

CampaignsReportAdGroupColumns.description: Columns in the ad groups CSV file of the Campaigns report download.

ad_type.description: Type of ad (e.g. SP, SB, SD)

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

attributed_orders_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand orders as a percentage of total

attributed_units_ordered_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand units as a percentage of total

attributed_sales_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand sales as a percentage of total

attributed_detail_page_views_clicks.description: Detail page view clicks attributed to ads

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)

CampaignsReportKeywordColumns.description: Columns in the keywords CSV file of the Campaigns report download.

ad_type.description: Type of ad (e.g. SP, SB, SD)

match_type.description: Keyword match type (e.g. broad, phrase, exact)

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

attributed_orders_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand orders as a percentage of total

attributed_units_ordered_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand units as a percentage of total

attributed_sales_ntb_percentage.description: New-to-brand sales as a percentage of total

attributed_detail_page_views_clicks.description: Detail page view clicks attributed to ads

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)

CampaignsReportProductAdColumns.description: Columns in the product ads CSV file of the Campaigns report download.

ad_type.description: Type of ad (e.g. SP, SB, SD)

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)

CampaignsReportProductColumns.description: Columns in the products CSV file of the Campaigns report download. Aggregated product-level advertising performance.

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)

ChannelProfitAndLossReportColumns.description: Rows present in the downloadable Channel Profit and Loss report CSV. This export is pivot-style with dynamic headers: the first column is a metric label, and remaining columns are either ['value', 'percentageIncome', 'valuePerUnit'] or ['Total', <month columns>].

rowLabel.description: Metric or breakdown label in the first column

value.description: Value column used in non-monthly view

percentageIncome.description: Percentage of revenue column used in non-monthly view

valuePerUnit.description: Value-per-unit column used in non-monthly view

Total.description: Total column used in monthly view

AmazonBuyBoxPerformanceReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Amazon Buy Box Performance report CSV. An additional 'offerPoints' column is included for Japanese marketplaces.

isFulfilledByAmazon.description: Whether the product is fulfilled by Amazon (FBA)

competitivePriceCurrencyCode.description: Currency code of the competitive price

offerRank.description: Rank of this offer among competing offers

offerIsFulfilledByAmazon.description: Whether the competing offer is FBA

offerIsPrime.description: Whether the offer is Prime eligible

offerIsNationalPrime.description: Whether the offer is National Prime

offerIsBuyBoxWinner.description: Whether this offer currently wins the Buy Box

offerIsFeaturedMerchant.description: Whether the seller is a Featured Merchant

offerListingPriceCurrencyCode.description: Currency code of the offer listing price

offerShippingCurrencyCode.description: Currency code of the offer shipping

CustomerLifetimeValueReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Customer Lifetime Value report CSV.

startTime.description: Start of the cohort time period

repeatRevenuePercentage.description: Percentage of revenue from repeat customers

repeatCustomersPercentage.description: Percentage of customers who are repeat buyers

averageRepeatLTV.description: Average lifetime value per repeat customer

ltvCacRatio.description: Ratio of lifetime value to customer acquisition cost

CancellationsAndRefundsReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Cancellations and Refunds report CSV. Note: cancelledSales, priorCancelledSales, cancelRate, and priorCancelRate columns are hidden for Amazon seller channels.

cancelledSales.description: Cancelled sales value (current period, hidden for Amazon sellers)

priorCancelledSales.description: Cancelled sales value (prior period, hidden for Amazon sellers)

cancelRate.description: Cancellation rate percentage (hidden for Amazon sellers)

priorCancelRate.description: Prior period cancellation rate (hidden for Amazon sellers)

RepeatPurchaseReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Repeat Purchase report CSV.

repeatSalesPercentage.description: Percentage of sales from repeat customers (current period)

priorRepeatSalesPercentage.description: Percentage of sales from repeat customers (prior period)

repeatCustomersPercentage.description: Percentage of customers who are repeat buyers (current period)

SubscribeAndSaveReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Subscribe and Save report CSV (Amazon).

notDeliveredDueToOOSPercent.description: Percentage of subscriptions not delivered due to out of stock

baseDiscount.description: Base Subscribe and Save discount percentage

eligibility.description: Product eligibility status for Subscribe and Save

ProductsReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Products report CSV (Amazon). This endpoint requires an Enterprise plan.

cogs.description: Cost of goods sold per unit

SuppressedProductReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Suppressed Product report CSV.

salesValue.description: Estimated lost sales value due to suppression

issueCount.description: Number of listing issues causing suppression

fixUrl.description: URL to fix the listing issues

MarketingByProductReportColumns.description: Columns present in the downloadable Marketing by Product report CSV. This export uses product-level Amazon advertising rows.

attributed_sales.description: Total sales attributed to ads (in target currency)

attributed_sales_same_sku.description: Sales attributed to the same SKU (in target currency)

attributed_conversions_same_sku.description: Conversions attributed to the same SKU

attributed_units_ordered.description: Total units ordered attributed to ads

attributed_units_ordered_same_sku.description: Units ordered for the same SKU

cost_per_click.description: Average cost per click (in target currency)
